_comment: Developer config — core plugins plus GitHub, devlog, jobs, deploy, test, and monitor. Ideal for software engineers using MiniClaw for coding workflows.
personaBlurb: A developer-focused assistant for coding, CI, and project management.
_comment_plugins: Informational — install.sh installs all plugins. This list shows which plugins this profile is designed around: github (PR/issue management), devlog (development logging), jobs (role-based workflows), deploy (deployment automation), test (test runner), monitor (uptime/health checks).
_comment_ghToken: Required by mc-board and mc-github. Create at https://github.com/settings/tokens with scopes: repo, read:org, workflow.
_comment_optional_tokens: anthropicToken powers the LLM runtime. Can also be set via ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var.
_comment_deploy: mc-deploy uses your existing SSH keys and git remotes. No extra credentials needed for basic usage.
_comment_monitor: mc-monitor runs local health checks by default. For external monitoring, configure endpoints in the plugin settings after install.
